productName: Seattle Bubble Works-Flower Joint - Super Boof (H) - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Super Boof supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
